creator: paulbeard@gmail.com
text:
php5-extensions does not register the files it installed which seems to make owncloud not work properly. 

Additionally, the info in phpinfo() doesn't match configured extensions, even after I remove the php5-extensions ports.

===>   php5-extensions-1.7 depends on file: /usr/local/include/php/main/php.h - found

Fix:
no idea
